description: Add Profile/Account Settings page and update login page to redirect to admin dashboard after login instead of home page.
steps: Create grape/src/pages/Admin/Profile.jsx - a protected page showing account settings: user email (read-only), last login time (from token), and links to change password. Use BaseLayout with AdminLayout wrapper.
Create grape/src/pages/Admin/Profile.css - style the profile page with a clean card layout.

Update grape/src/pages/Login/Login.jsx to redirect to /admin/dashboard after successful login instead of '/' (home). Keep the redirect query parameter support - if ?redirect= is present, use that path instead.
Update grape/src/App.jsx to add route /admin/profile wrapped in ProtectedRoute, import Profile component.
Update the AdminLayout sidebar (grape/src/components/AdminLayout/index.jsx) to include Profile link (/admin/profile).
acceptance_criteria: The /admin/profile page renders showing the user's email and account info
After login, user is redirected to /admin/dashboard instead of home page
The ?redirect= query parameter still works when present
Admin sidebar includes a Profile link
npm run build succeeds without errors
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/thingswell-homepage-model001/grape && npm run build` and confirm it succeeds with exit code 0
